General.Name: Stern Groep N.V.
General.Description: PB Holding N.V. provides financial services. It holds and manages certificates of shares in the capital of Bovemij N.V. The company was formerly known as Stern Groep N.V. and changed its name to PB Holding N.V. in March 2022. PB Holding N.V. is based in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.

1.Name: Mr. L. G. Porsius R.A.
1.Title: Financial Director, Member of Management Board & Member of the Group Council

2.Name: Dr. Loes M. C. van Dalen
2.Title: Director of Human Resources & Member of the Group Council
